context.prerequisite: All domain files extracted to lib/db/

task.objective: Complete the migration by updating index.ts and removing the original db.ts
task.motivation: The original db.ts should now only contain re-exports. Moving getQueriesForOrg to index.ts and deleting db.ts completes the reorganization.

constraints.constraint: Ensure all exports are preserved in index.ts
No breaking changes to import paths

step.name: Update index.ts
Delete Original db.ts
step.action:
Once index.ts is complete and verified:
```bash # First verify the build passes npm run build
# If successful, delete the original file rm lib/db.ts ```

step.name: Full Verification
step.action:
Run comprehensive tests:
```bash # Type check npm run build
# Lint npm run lint
# Start dev server npm run dev ```
Manually verify: 1. Dashboard loads at / 2. Metrics display correctly 3. Navigation works 4. API routes respond

step.name: Verify Import Paths
step.action:
Ensure all consumers still work:
```bash # Find all imports from lib/db grep -r "from ['\"]@/lib/db['\"]" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" ```
All imports should continue to work without modification.

step.name: Document Final Structure
step.action:
Update any documentation that references lib/db.ts to mention lib/db/:
```bash # Check if CLAUDE.md mentions lib/db.ts grep -n "lib/db" CLAUDE.md ```
Update any references to reflect the new structure.

implementation_prompt.final_structure: ``` lib/db/ ├── index.ts # Main entry point with all exports + getQueriesForOrg ├── connection.ts # getSql, setServiceAccountContext ├── utils.ts # generateTestSignature, isTestFlaky ├── types.ts # Local interfaces ├── executions.ts # Execution CRUD ├── results.ts # Test results queries ├── metrics.ts # Dashboard metrics ├── search.ts # Search and history ├── flakiness.ts # Flakiness detection ├── performance.ts # Performance regression ├── comparison.ts # Execution comparison ├── classification.ts # Failure classification ├── api-keys.ts # API key management └── ingestion.ts # Data insertion ```

completion.summary: The database module reorganization is complete. The ~2970 line lib/db.ts has been split into 13 focused domain files, making the codebase more maintainable and easier to navigate.
completion.benefits: - Clear domain separation - Each file under 500 lines - Easy to find where to add new queries - Backwards compatible (no consumer changes needed) - Better code organization

mandatory_final_step.description: Update status.md with final completion status.
mandatory_final_step.action: UPDATE docs/prompts/db-abstraction-refactor/status.md with: - Date, Phase: 04_cleanup_verify - Status: completed - Final file structure - Total files created - Verification results - Feature completion summary
